name: Vanilla Wafer Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crushed vanilla wafers, melted butter, lemon zest, and granulated sugar together until well combined.
2. Press the mixture into a greased 8-inch pan.
3. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
4. Allow to cool completely before removing from the pan.
